description: Acme Cloud sells workflow automation software to mid-market and enterprise customers.

balance_sheet_survivability.summary: The company remains cash generative with no near-term debt pressure.

revenue_recurrence_contract_strength.summary: Net revenue retention eased to 113% as seat expansion slowed.

customer_concentration.summary: A newly expanded strategic customer now represents 12% of revenue.

pricing_power.summary: Renewal pricing still held despite slower seat growth.

demand_cyclicality_purchase_deferrabilit.summary: SMB customers delayed new seat purchases for budget reasons.
